headline: Anthropic raises Claude Code pricing 5x while expanding global access
body: Anthropic has significantly increased pricing for Claude Code while simultaneously lifting export controls on Claude Fable 5 and making it available globally. For healthcare AI implementations, this pricing shift directly impacts cost-benefit analyses for clinical documentation automation and code generation workflows that leverage Claude's API. Organizations building EHR integrations or deploying Claude-based clinical decision support tools will need to reassess their vendor economics and budget forecasts. The expanded global availability of Fable 5 creates new competitive options for cost-sensitive healthcare systems, potentially offsetting the Code tier increase for certain use cases.
